title: Set<string>
description: Root `Set<string>`. JSON serializes the set to an array via `Array.from(v)` and restores it with `new Set(v)`; string elements are atomic so no per-element transform runs. Binary writes a uint32 size prefix followed by the encoded elements, then rebuilds the Set.
notes: Set round-trips as a JSON array (insertion order preserved), rehydrated to a Set on decode.
